tasks.title: Choose the first project tasks from the starting summary
tasks.whatToBuild: Review the promoted conversation summary and decide which small tasks should be created first. Keep this human-guided so the new Project Space starts cleanly instead of copying raw chat history.
acceptanceCriteria: The starting summary has been reviewed by the maintainer or project participants.
The first concrete tasks are identified in plain language.
No raw conversation transcript is copied into the project workspace.
